description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with a legal brief draft ('Defamation_Brief_Draft.docx'). The document contains an argument section citing three Supreme Court cases: 'New York Times Co. v. Sullivan', 'Curtis Publishing Co. v. Butts', and 'Gertz v. Robert Welch, Inc.'. Mark the first occurrence of each of these three cases in the text as citations, including the full citation strings. In the 'TABLE OF AUTHORITIES' section on page 2, insert a Table of Authorities using the 'Classic' format and 'Cases' category. Save the document as 'Defamation_Brief_Final.docx' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

expected_cases: New York Times Co. v. Sullivan
